name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Discovery Via Default Driver Altitude - Sysmon
notes:
This Building Block detects usage of "findstr" with the argument "385201". Which could indicate potential discovery of an installed Sysinternals Sysmon service using the default driver altitude.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Findstr 385201 Execution
SIGMA Description: Discovery of an installed Sysinternals Sysmon service using driver altitude (even if the name is changed).


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Discovery Via Default Driver Altitude - Sysmon on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of findstr.exe
when the event matches "Command" LIKE '% 385201%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Discovery Via Default Driver Altitude - Sysmon on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of findstr.exe
AND when the event matches "Command" LIKE '% 385201%' AQL filter query
